# Quote Portal

> [!gap] This page is a stub. Expand with: pricing, admin contacts, SSO status, HubSpot integration details, renewal date.

Quote Portal is Gunner Roofing's quote customization and management tool. Used by the sales team to generate and customize customer-facing roofing quotes.

## How It's Used at Gunner

- Quote creation and customization for customer proposals
- Used alongside [[vendors/hubspot|HubSpot]] for deal management

## SSO Status

Unknown — verify in [[gunner/app-inventory]].
